strengths: 13+ years of full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB matching the primary stack
Current role involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly aligned with AI agent development requirement
Strong software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, Docker/Kubernetes, and architecture-level contributions
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; Java appears only in older robotics/device orchestration roles
Vitest not explicitly listed, though general testing framework expertise is evident

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and limited recent Kotlin/Java

response.justification: Candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years experience bar with strong full-stack credentials in the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and directly relevant AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq. Cloud, containerization, databases, Git, and testing discipline are all well-covered. Gaps around Nest.js and recent Kotlin/Java are real but learnable for a senior engineer with this breadth, especially given demonstrated polyglot adaptability (DLang, Java, C/C++, Swift).
